key_learnings: Understanding the role of genes in nutrition management. Advanced gene-diet interaction models developed. Personalized nutrition plans based on genetic profiles now operational.
research_findings: Identified specific gene-nutrient interactions. Confirmed pharmacogenomic links between SNPs and micronutrient metabolism. Epigenetic dietary modifications mapped.
current_focus_areas: Research on nutrient metabolomics. Fine-tuning genetic risk scoring for dietary disease prevention. Collaborative integration with microbiome and hydration bots.
